reasoning: The informal statement asks to show that the multiplicative groups ℝ\{0} and ℂ\{0} are not isomorphic. In Lean/Mathlib, `ℝˣ` is the group of units of ℝ (i.e., ℝ\{0} under multiplication), and `ℂˣ` is the group of units of ℂ (i.e., ℂ\{0} under multiplication). The type `ℝˣ ≃* ℂˣ` is the type of multiplicative group isomorphisms between them, and `IsEmpty` asserts that this type has no inhabitants — precisely the claim that no such isomorphism exists. This matches the informal claim exactly, with no added or missing hypotheses.
